debug_info.goal:
Balanced : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₀ : ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))), Balanced s ↔ ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, A ≠ B → ∃ C ∈ s, dist A C = dist B C
center_free : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) → Prop
hb₁ :
  ∀ (s : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2))),
    center_free s ↔
      ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, ∀ C ∈ s, A ≠ B ∧ B ≠ C ∧ A ≠ C → ¬∃ P ∈ s, dist P A = dist P B ∧ dist P B = dist P C
⊢ (∀ n ≥ 3, ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ s.card = n) ∧
    {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ center_free s ∧ s.card = n} = {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ Odd n}

sorry

  · intro n hn

constructor
  · intro n hn
    rcases hn with h | h | h | h
    · -- Case n = 3: An equilateral triangle is balanced.
      sorry
    · -- Case n = 4: Two equilateral triangles sharing a side.
      sorry
    · -- General construction for n points:
      -- For n odd, use a regular n-gon.
      -- For n even, use a construction like two regular (n/2)-gons with a common side.
      sorry
    · sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨hn, s, h_bal, h_cf, h_card⟩
      rw [hb₀] at h_bal; rw [hb₁] at h_cf
      -- Counting argument:
      -- Let N = n(n-1)/2 be the number of pairs {A, B} ⊆ s.
      -- For each P ∈ s, let k_P be the number of pairs {A, B} ⊆ s \ {P} with PA = PB.
      -- h_cf implies k_P ≤ floor((n-1)/2).
      -- h_bal implies Σ_{P∈s} k_P ≥ N.
      -- Thus, n(n-1)/2 ≤ n * floor((n-1)/2).
      -- If n is even, (n-1)/2 is not an integer, so floor((n-1)/2) = (n-2)/2.
      -- n(n-1)/2 ≤ n(n-2)/2 implies n-1 ≤ n-2, a contradiction.
      -- Therefore, n must be odd.
      have h_odd : Odd n := by
        contrapose! hn
        obtain ⟨k, rfl⟩ := Nat.even_iff_exists_two_mul.mp (Nat.not_odd_iff_even.mp hn)
        have h_kp : ∀ P ∈ s, ∃ (k_P : ℕ), k_P ≤ (2 * k - 2) / 2 ∧ 
          (∀ {A B}, A ∈ s → B ∈ s → A ≠ B → dist P A = dist P B → k_P > 0) := sorry
        sorry
      exact ⟨hn, h_odd⟩
    · rintro ⟨hn, h_odd⟩
      -- For n odd, a regular n-gon is both balanced and centre-free.
      -- Perpendicular bisectors of any two vertices pass through exactly one vertex.
      -- The circumcenter of any three vertices is the center of the regular n-gon,
      -- which is not a vertex for n ≥ 3.
      sorry

          _ ≤ (s.biUnion f).card := Finset.card_le_of_subset h_union
          _ ≤ ∑ P ∈ s, (f P).card := Finset.card_biUnion_le
          _ ≤ ∑ _P ∈ s, (if Even n then n - 2 else n - 1) := by
              apply Finset.sum_le_sum; intro P hP
              rcases Nat.even_or_odd n with hne | hno
              · have h_le := h_card_f P hP

                  by_contra h_eq; rw [←not_even_iff_odd] at h_even_f
                  exact (h_even_f P hP).not_odd (h_eq.symm ▸ hne.prep_sub_one (by linarith))
                linarith
              · exact h_card_f P hP
          _ = n * (if Even n then n - 2 else n - 1) := by simp [h_card]
      rcases Nat.even_or_odd n with hne | hno
      · simp [hne] at this; linarith
      · exact ⟨hn, hno⟩
    · rintro ⟨hn, hno⟩

  · intro n hn
    induction' n, hn using Nat.le_induction with n hn _
    · sorry
    · sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h3n, s, hb, hcf, rfl⟩
      have : s.card * ((s.card - 1) / 2) ≥ s.card * (s.card - 1) / 2 := sorry
      rw [hb₀] at hb
      rw [hb₁] at hcf
      contrapose! this
      sorry
    · rintro ⟨h3n, ho⟩
      refine ⟨h3n, ?_⟩
      sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h3n, s, hb_s, hcf_s, h_s⟩
      sorry
    · rintro ⟨h3n, hodd⟩
      sorry

rw [Finset.card_offDiag, s.card_val]
      let f : s.offDiag → s := fun ⟨⟨A, B⟩, hAB⟩ =>
        haveI hne : A ≠ B := (Finset.mem_offDiag.mp hAB).2.2
        haveI hA : A ∈ s := (Finset.mem_offDiag.mp hAB).1
        haveI hB' : B ∈ s := (Finset.mem_offDiag.mp hAB).2.1
        Classical.choose ((hb₀ s).mp hB A hA B hB' hne)
      have h_count (P : s) : (pairs.filter (fun p => f p = P)).card ≤ n - 1 - (n % 2) := by
        sorry
      have : n * (n - 1) ≤ n * (n - 2 + (n % 2)) := by
        sorry
      sorry
    · rintro ⟨hn, h_odd⟩
      sorry
sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    -- For any n ≥ 3, there exists a balanced set of n points.
    -- If n is odd, a regular n-gon is balanced.
    -- If n is even, a construction involving two concentric regular polygons or a modified regular polygon works.
    sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨hn, s, hB, hCF, hcard⟩
      -- If n is even, we reach a contradiction by counting pairs {A, B} equidistant from a point P.
      -- Balanced condition: Σ_{P ∈ s} k(P) ≥ n(n-1)/2, where k(P) is the number of such pairs for P.
      -- Center-free condition: 2 * k(P) ≤ n-1 for each P in s.
      -- Combining these, n(n-1)/2 ≤ n * floor((n-1)/2). If n is even, (n-1)/2 is not an integer.
      sorry
    · rintro ⟨hn, h_odd⟩
      -- For odd n, a regular n-gon is both balanced and center-free.
      -- The perpendicular bisector of any two vertices passes through the circumcenter and exactly one vertex.
      -- Since the circumcenter is not a vertex, the set is center-free.
      sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h3n, s, hb, hcf, hs⟩
      rw [hb₀] at hb
      rw [hb₁] at hcf
      have h_card : n * (n - 1) / 2 ≤ n * ((n - 1) / 2) := sorry
      have : Odd n := sorry
      exact this
    · rintro ⟨h3n, hn_odd⟩
      sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    sorry
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨hn, s, hB, hCF, hc⟩
      sorry
    · rintro ⟨hn, hO⟩
      sorry

intro C hC
        let sC := (pairs.filter (λ p => f p = C)).image (λ p => p.1)
        sorry -- Since S is center-free, each C can be the midpoint of at most (n-1)/2 pairs.
      have : n * (n - 1) ≤ n * (if Odd n then n - 1 else n - 2) := sorry
      exact Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mpr (λ h_even => by sorry)
    · obtain ⟨s, hb_s, hcf_s, hs⟩ := (ih_odd : ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ center_free s ∧ s.card = n) -- Regular n-gon works.
      exact ⟨hn, s, hb_s, hcf_s, hs⟩
  where ih : {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ ∃ s, Balanced s ∧ center_free s ∧ s.card = n} = {n | 3 ≤ n ∧ Odd n} := sorry
sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    rcases n with (_|_|_|n)
    · exfalso; linarith
    · exfalso; linarith
    · use Finset.image (fun i : ℕ => ![Real.cos (2 * Real.pi * i / 3), Real.sin (2 * Real.pi * i / 3)]) (Finset.range 3)
      sorry
    · sorry
  · ext n; constructor
    · rintro ⟨h3, s, h_bal, h_cf, rfl⟩
      rw [hb₀] at h_bal; rw [hb₁] at h_cf
      have h_bound : ∀ P ∈ s, {p : Finset (EuclideanSpace ℝ (Fin 2)) | p.card = 2 ∧ p ⊆ s ∧ ∀ A ∈ p, dist P A = dist P A}.card ≤ (s.card - 1) / 2 := sorry
      have h_total : (s.card * (s.card - 1)) / 2 ≤ s.card * ((s.card - 1) / 2) := sorry
      exact Nat.odd_iff_not_even.mpr (fun h_even => by
        have h_contra : (s.card - 1) / 2 < (s.card - 1) / 2.0 := sorry
        sorry)
    · rintro ⟨h3, h_odd⟩
      use Finset.image (fun i : ℕ => ![Real.cos (2 * Real.pi * i / n), Real.sin (2 * Real.pi * i / n)]) (Finset.range n)
      sorry

constructor
  · intro n hn
    obtain ⟨k, rfl | rfl⟩ := Nat.even_or_odd n
    · admit -- Construction for even n: regular (n-1)-gon and its center
    · admit -- Construction for odd n: regular n-gon
  · ext n
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨hn, s, h_bal, h_cf, h_card⟩
      rw [hb₀] at h_bal; rw [hb₁] at h_cf
      have h_unique : ∀ A ∈ s, ∀ B ∈ s, A ≠ B → ∃! C ∈ s, dist A C = dist B C := by
        intro A HA B HB HAB
        obtain ⟨C, HC, Hdist⟩ := h_bal A HA B HB HAB
        refine ⟨C, ⟨HC, Hdist⟩, ?_⟩
        rintro D ⟨HD, HDdist⟩
        by_contra h_diff; refine h_cf A HA B HB D HD HAB ?_ ⟨C, HC, Hdist, ?_⟩
        · constructor <;> try constructor <;> try assumption
          · intro h; subst h; rw [dist_self, ← HDdist] at Hdist; exact HAB (dist_eq_zero.1 Hdist.symm)
          · intro h; subst h; rw [dist_self, ← HDdist] at Hdist; exact HAB (dist_eq_zero.1 Hdist)
        · rw [HDdist, ← Hdist]
      let pairs := s.powerset.filter (fun t => t.card = 2)
      have h_card_pairs : pairs.card = n * (n - 1) / 2 := by admit
      let f : {t // t ∈ pairs} → s := fun ⟨t, ht⟩ => by
        obtain ⟨A, B, hAB, h_mem, rfl⟩ := Finset.card_eq_two.1 (Finset.mem_filter.1 ht).2
        exact (h_unique A (h_mem (Set.mem_insert_self _ _)) B (h_mem (Set.mem_insert_of_mem (Set.mem_singleton _))) hAB).choose
      have h_preimage : ∀ C ∈ s, (pairs.filter (fun t => f ⟨t, by assumption⟩ = C)).card ≤ (n - 1) / 2 := by admit
      have h_sum : pairs.card = (s.attach.map ⟨fun C => (pairs.filter (fun t => f ⟨t, by assumption⟩ = C)).card, by admit⟩).sum := by admit
      have : n * (n - 1) / 2 ≤ n * ((n - 1) / 2) := by admit
      rw [Nat.Odd, ← Nat.mod_two_ne_zero]
      admit
    · rintro ⟨hn, h_odd⟩
      admit -- Regular n-gon is balanced and center-free for odd n
